type_definitions.name: BlobFetchResult
type_definitions.description: Existing usecase enum (Found(T) / NotFound / FetchError(String)) returned by TrackBlobReader when the merge gate fetches a track-level document from a git ref. Referenced here because the new stale/missing detection for `<layer>-type-signals.json` (ADR 2026-04-18-1400 §D5) is a new consumer of this abstraction when invoked through `check_strict_merge_gate`. The new flow reads the evaluation-result blob via the same port and maps NotFound to a Missing signal and declaration_hash mismatch to a Stale signal — both fail-closed. No modifications to the enum itself; reference declaration keeps the usecase catalogue non-empty per Stage 2 TDDD verification requirement.
